meaning: n.突围,(感情等)迸发,俏皮话,远足v.突围,出发 Sally 萨利(女子名)
examples: Sally was ecstatic about her new job.
Sally had attended a racially mixed school.
The best though, many locals including Spelman swears, is Sally's Apizza, around since 1938.
Sligh's wife, Sally, was the only one of the three who remained hospitalized Friday.
